description: Intraday theta-harvesting strategy: sells an ATM call and an OTM call (OTM_OFFSET above ATM) on a fixed 5-minute cadence. Exits the entire position at 3:15 PM. Includes an IV-spike stop-loss and a minimum-IV filter to ensure collected premium is meaningful.

STRIKE_STEP.description: Strike grid size in dollars; strikes are rounded to the nearest multiple.

OTM_OFFSET.description: Distance above ATM (in dollars) for the short OTM call strike.

ENTRY_INTERVAL_MS.description: Minimum milliseconds between successive entry signals (5 minutes = 300 000 ms).

EXIT_TIME.description: Wall-clock time (HH:mm:ss) at which all open legs are closed for the day.

IV_MIN_THRESHOLD.description: Minimum implied volatility (10 %) required to open new short-call legs.

IV_STOP_THRESHOLD.description: IV spike stop-loss level (120 %): closes all legs immediately if IV exceeds this value.

MIN_VOLUME.description: Minimum underlying daily volume; prevents trading illiquid names.
